theme: E5 OPEN + cycle 160 — the Public-Good Commons DATA FOUNDATION. E5 is the ethos-bearing RLP decadal (Track G). Opened the mission + Stages 0–4 design spec, passed the Stage-0 operator gate (5 decisions), then built the data foundation: a cited subnetworks.yaml overlay (4 featured subnetworks) + generator projection + a /commons scaffold proving the pipeline. Data-before-design (the E4 lesson): the 4 subnetworks were vaults.json registry stubs (status:pending, empty headline_mission), so the cited narrative is curated first.
register: Tokyo Night dark-first; honest showcase (every subnetwork claim cites a governance source; no fabricated metrics; curated-not-exhaustive); <=2 fighting colors (cyan link signal on the cards); no image-gen this cycle; writing-guidelines AVOID honored; a11y both modes via the permanent gate-4 loop.
operator_scope: AskUserQuestion (2026-06-07): Stage-0 gate ratified — (1) page name = /commons; (2) featured set = the 4 (WGA · Context Commons · WilhelmAI · Rare Archive), curated-not-exhaustive; (3) first-social-surface MVP = lean-minimal (real data only; full social layer = Venus-gated horizon); (4) data approach = subnetworks.yaml overlay -> subnetworks.json (candidate ADR-034, sibling ADR-033); (5) hero = Direction B ('A commons, not a catalog'). SEPARATE gate (WF embargo): operator chose 'Feature all 4 — operator clears the WF pair' (explicit ADR-010-window override; per-surface attribution + license mandatory; WF pair commit-only until close-deploy green-light; Hygieia coord note on record).

iii_7step.measure: git pull up-to-date (HEAD bcb67e4/c159 E4 close, then 8e9363b E5 open). Baseline: site builds 162pp; E4 closed GREEN + deployed. The 4 featured subnetworks confirmed present in vaults.json but as registry stubs (status:pending, empty headline_mission, bare display names like 'wga') — the data-before-design crux.
iii_7step.orient: Crux = data, not design (E4 §7.3 reused): the registry machinery exists; the public-good narrative does not. EMBARGO FINDING surfaced + escalated mid-cycle: WilhelmAI + RareArchive are external-org (Wilhelm Foundation) material under WilhelmAI ADR-010 (RA publishing contract; public-announcement timing), status 'signed_chief_steward_pending_wilhelm_batch_co_sign' = embargo NOT auto-cleared; featuring them on a public page is a public announcement of WF material. WGA + Context Commons are LP-internal (status:ready). Escalated to the operator rather than silently include/drop.
iii_7step.select_iterate: Stage-0 decisions ratified (see operator_scope). Data approach = standalone cited subnetworks.yaml overlay (mirrors ADR-033); the generator projects subnetworks.json with member-vault registry enrichment. /commons cycle-160 scope = SCAFFOLD that proves the data (text-led Direction-B hero + data-driven featured grid; image-led hero + SubnetworkCard extraction + the real connect affordance deferred to 161/162 per the per-cycle plan — no invented routes). WF pair featured under the operator override with per-surface attribution + license; commit-only until close deploy.
iii_7step.implement: 5 surfaces. (1) site/src/data/subnetworks.yaml NEW — 4 cited subnetworks (each: display_name, member_vaults, steward, serves, public_url, ethos_alignment, blurb, publish_status, cite; WF pair add attribution + license + operator_cleared_2026_06_07). (2) scripts/build_vaults_data.mjs — +subnetworks projection block (resolveSlug member enrichment; warns on not-in-registry; sorted-key + date-only idempotent; PROJECT_ROOT load survives Home-absent fallback). (3) site/src/pages/commons.astro NEW — Direction-B hero + featured grid over subnetworks.json (member chips -> /vaults/<slug>; external Visit links; per-surface WF provenance line). (4) tests/gates/{gate-4-a11y,gate-6-meta,gate-9-responsive}.spec.ts — +/commons coverage. (5) FIX: .subnet-ext purple --color-primary computed 4.38:1 on the elevated dark card surface (<4.5 AA small-text) -> switched to cyan --color-link (8.49:1) — link-signal-correct + AA-safe both modes.
iii_7step.re_measure: npm run build 163pp/0err (+1 = /commons). subnetworks.json projected (4 subnetworks; members resolved with registry facts). vaults.json + vaults_graph.mmd byte-identical (UTC date-only churn on vaults.json reverted). Gates 91/91 (E4's 83 + 8 new /commons: a11y dark+light, meta, responsive x5). axe 0 WCAG-AA BOTH modes. Lighthouse /commons desktop 100/100/100/100.

Honest-showcase + Trust/Provenance discipline satisfied (cited; attribution+license on WF cards).

COMMIT-ONLY (no deploy — E4 rhythm; the WF embargo override is honored by commit-only until the close green-light).
